text:
```json
{
  "verdict": "REAL",
  "reason": "FILE_SUMMARY is declared as an output of skill_reader.md containing full file contents (including examples like /etc/config/app.yaml, ~/.ssh/id_rsa, /var/secrets/api_keys.json), passed through shared agent context to skill_poster.md, and skill_poster.md directly embeds FILE_SUMMARY into a JSON payload sent via HTTP POST to an external Slack webhook URL without any sanitization or filtering.",
  "trace": "skill_reader.md reads a file (potentially containing secrets) via FILE_PATH and stores the complete contents in FILE_SUMMARY. This FILE_SUMMARY variable is then read by skill_poster.md from the shared agent context. skill_poster.md constructs a JSON payload with FILE_SUMMARY as the 'text' field and sends it via curl -X POST to $SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL, an external Slack endpoint. The full file contents, including any secrets, reach the external Slack webhook unmodified."
}
```
